name: pm-soft-skills
description: Practical PM guidance distilled from Tapan Kamdar's Building Blocks newsletter, 'That's What Makes a Great PM' series, AI Force Multiplier series, and the book Level Up. Covers 27 PM tasks across 7 themes: Writing & Docs, Communication & Influence, Planning & Strategy, Meetings & Decisions, People & Feedback, Team Leadership, and Research & Discovery.
